title: enicostema verticillare
intro: Enicostema verticillate, also known as the snake gourd or snake plant, is a perennial plant belonging to the Gentianaceae family. It is widely used in Ayurvedic medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Enicostema verticillata include its ability to treat fever, sore throat, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to help manage diabetes and cardiovascular disease. Enicostema verticillata is often prepared as a herbal tea or powder, and can also be used to make a decoction, which is a liquid extract made by boiling the plant in water.
